reason: Successfully verified the agent can receive messages and respond correctly to a math question
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - App loaded successfully with sidebar showing two agents
Step 2: Clicked on agent "QA-20260721-180340-dncd" in sidebar - Agent page loaded successfully
Step 3: Verified agent status - Agent status shows "idle" ✓ (satisfies "running or idle" requirement)
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully sent and submitted
Step 5: Waited for response - Agent responded within 1 second (well under the 3-minute timeout)
Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" - Response clearly displays "4" as the answer, and page title updated to "Math Question with QA Agent"
